debug_info.goal:
C : Type
inst✝¹ : Category.{0, 0} C
K : Type
inst✝ : DivisionRing K
M : CategoryTheory.Functor C (ModuleCat K)
D : @Dual.DirectSumDecomposition C inst✝¹ K inst✝ M
B : (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) → N ∈ D → Set (PersistenceSubmodule M)
hB : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), N = sSup (B N hN)
hB' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), sSupIndep (B N hN)
hB'' : ∀ (N : PersistenceSubmodule M) (hN : N ∈ D), ⊥ ∉ B N hN
x : PersistenceSubmodule M
hx : x ∈ ⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN
a : PersistenceSubmodule M
ha : a ≤ x
ha' : a ≤ sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x})
⊢ a ≤ ⊥

failed_attempts:
simp only [Set.mem_Union] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_a_N : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx)
    have h_sup_le : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (SetLike.coe D \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_Union, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hy_neq_x⟩
      by_cases h : N' = N
      · subst h; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hy_neq_x⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_trans (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hyB) (le_sSup (Set.mem_diff_singleton.mpr ⟨hN', h⟩)))
    have h_a_sup_N : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_a_inf : a ≤ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (SetLike.coe D \ {N})) ⊓ N := le_inf (ha'.trans h_sup_le) h_a_N
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (fun y hy => hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hy.1)), (D.sSupIndep N hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at h_a_inf
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot (le_inf ha h_a_sup_N)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans ((le_sSup hxB).trans_eq (hB N hN).symm)
    have ha'N : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le_iff.mpr ?_)
      rintro y ⟨hy, hyx⟩
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨N', hN', hyB'⟩
      by_cases h : N' = N
      · exact h ▸ (le_sSup ⟨hyB', hyx⟩).trans le_sup_left
      · exact ((le_sSup hyB').trans_eq (hB N' hN').symm |>.trans (le_sSup (s := D \ {N}) ⟨hN', h⟩)).trans le_sup_right
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_mod : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup (D \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := le_inf haN ha'N
      rwa [inf_sup_assoc_of_le ((sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset (B N hN) {x})).trans (hB N hN).symm.le),
        (D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (Set.diff_subset D {N}) (by simp)).eq_bot,
        bot_sup_eq] at h_mod
    exact hB' N hN hxB ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx; rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hxB
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N}) := ha'.trans (sSup_le fun y hy ↦ by
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
      rcases eq_or_ne N N' with rfl | hne
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', hne.symm⟩ ((hB N' hN').symm ▸ le_sSup hyB)))
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N})) := le_inf (ha.trans hxN) this
      have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ (N ⊓ sSup (D \ {N})) :=
        this.trans (inf_sup_assoc_of_le ((hB N hN).symm ▸ sSup_le fun y hy ↦ le_sSup hy.1) _)
      exact this.trans (sup_le_sup_left (D.sSupIndep' N hN _ inf_le_left inf_le_right) _)
    exact hB' N hN x hxB a ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (le_sSup hx).trans (hB N hN).ge
    have h_sSup : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      rw [sSup_le_iff]; rintro y ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
      obtain rfl | hN_ne := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (((le_sSup hyB).trans (hB N' hN').ge).trans (le_sSup ⟨hN', hN_ne⟩))
    have h_mod : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_inf := le_inf (ha.trans hxN) (ha'.trans h_sSup)
      have h_mod_eq := inf_sup_self_of_le ((sSup_le_iff.mpr (fun y hy => le_sSup hy.1)).trans (hB N hN).ge)
      rw [h_mod_eq, (D.sSupIndep hN).inf_eq, sup_bot] at h_inf
      exact h_inf
    exact (hB' N hN hx) ha h_mod

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx
    have hBN : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)
    have ha_sup : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le_iff.mpr fun y hy ↦ ?_)
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
      rcases eq_or_ne N' N with rfl | hne
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', hne⟩ ((hB N' hN').symm ▸ le_sSup hyB))
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := le_inf (ha.trans hxN) ha_sup
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le hBN, (D.sSupIndep N hN).eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot ha this

obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := by simpa [Set.mem_iUnion] using hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hxB
    have hS1 : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ sSup_le (fun y hy => le_sSup hy.1)
    have haS1S2 : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le (fun y hy => ?_))
      obtain ⟨N', hN', hyB⟩ := by simpa [Set.mem_iUnion] using hy.1
      if h : N' = N then
        exact le_sup_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hy.2⟩)
      else
        exact le_sup_right (le_sSup_of_le (⟨hN', h⟩ : N' ∈ D.carrier \ {N}) (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hyB))
    have haS1 : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have hN_disj : Disjoint N (sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := D.sSupIndep hN
      have : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) := le_inf (ha.trans hxN) haS1S2
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le hS1, hN_disj.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (le_inf ha haS1).trans (hB' N hN hxB)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_aN : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx)
    have ha'' : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le (λ y hy => ?_))
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hy'⟩, hne⟩
      by_cases h : N' = N
      · subst h; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy', hne⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', h⟩ (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hy'))
    have ha''' : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have := le_inf h_aN ha''
      rwa [inf_comm, sup_inf_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (λ y hy => hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hy.1)),
        (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN hx).le_bot ha ha'''

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := by simpa using hx
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans (by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx)
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_le_sup : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
        refine sSup_le ?_
        rintro y ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
        by_cases h : N' = N
        · subst h; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
        · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', h⟩ (by rw [← hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hyB))
      simpa [inf_sup_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (fun y hy => by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hy.1)) (D.sSupIndep hN).eq_bot] using le_inf haN (ha'.trans h_le_sup)
    exact (le_inf ha this).trans (hB' N hN hx).le_bot

obtain ⟨N, hN, hxN⟩ := by simpa using hx
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hxN)
    have ha_BN : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) ⊓ N :=
        le_inf (ha'.trans (sSup_le (by
          rintro y ⟨⟨M, hM, hyM⟩, hyx⟩
          obtain rfl | hMN := eq_or_ne M N
          · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyM, hyx⟩)
          · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le (⟨hM, hMN⟩ : M ∈ D.carrier \ {N}) (hB M hM ▸ le_sSup hyM))))) haN
      rwa [inf_comm, inf_sup_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (fun y hy => hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hy.1)),
           inf_comm, (D.sSupIndep hN).eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (le_inf ha ha_BN).trans (hB' N hN hxN)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx)
    have ha_sup : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup ((D : Set _) \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le fun y hy => ?_)
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hy⟩, hyx⟩
      obtain rfl | hNE := eq_or_ne N N'
      · exact le_sup_left.trans (le_sSup ⟨hy, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_right.trans (le_sSup_of_le (show N' ∈ (D : Set _) \ {N} from ⟨hN', hNE.symm⟩) (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hy))
    have ha_BN : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) :=
      (le_inf ha_sup haN).trans (D.sSupIndep N hN).symm.sup_inf_of_le_left (hB N hN ▸ sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)).le
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot ha ha_BN

obtain ⟨N, hN, hxB⟩ := by simpa using hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hxB
    have h_le : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine sSup_le (fun y hy => ?_)
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      obtain ⟨⟨M, hM, hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      obtain rfl | hMN := eq_or_ne M N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hM, hMN⟩ ((hB M hM).symm ▸ le_sSup hyB))
    exact (Disjoint.mono ha (le_trans ha' h_le) (disjoint_sup_right.mpr ⟨hB' N hN x hxB, (D.sSupIndep N hN).mono_left hxN⟩)).le_bot

simp only [Set.mem_Union] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := hx
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans ((hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx)
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_subset : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
        rw [sSup_le_iff]; intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_Union, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
        obtain ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
        obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
        · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
        · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le (⟨hN', hne⟩ : N' ∈ D.carrier \ {N}) ((hB N' hN').symm ▸ le_sSup hyB))
      have modular : (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) ⊓ N = sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
        rw [← inf_sup_modular_of_le_left (sSup_le_iff.mpr (fun y hy => (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hy.1)),
            (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.inf_eq_bot, sup_bot_eq]
      exact (le_inf (ha'.trans h_subset) haN).trans modular.le
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot ha this

rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
    have hS : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le
      rintro y ⟨⟨N', hN', hy⟩, hyx⟩
      by_cases h : N' = N
      · subst h; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy, hyx⟩)
      · have : y ≤ N' := by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hy
        exact le_sup_of_le_right (this.trans (le_sSup ⟨hN', h⟩))
    refine (le_inf ha ha').trans (le_trans (inf_le_inf_left _ hS) ?_)
    have hZN : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)
    rw [sup_comm, ← inf_of_le_left hxN, inf_assoc, inf_sup_of_le_right hZN,
      disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp (D.sSupIndep N hN), bot_sup_eq]
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx'⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (le_sSup hx').trans (hB N hN).ge
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have hS : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
        apply sSup_le; intro y hy
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
        by_cases h : N' = N
        · subst h; exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
        · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup_of_le (Set.mem_diff_singleton.mpr ⟨hN', h⟩) ((le_sSup hyB).trans (hB N' hN').ge))
      have : a ≤ N ⊓ (sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x})) := le_inf (ha.trans hxN) (ha'.trans hS)
      rwa [inf_sup_assoc_of_le (sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _) |>.trans (hB N hN).ge), (D.sSupIndep hN).eq_bot, bot_sup_eq] at this
    exact hB' N hN hx' ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans ((hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx)
    have ha_rest : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le (fun y hy => ?_))
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
      obtain rfl | hNN' := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_trans ((hB N' hN').symm ▸ le_sSup hyB) (le_sSup ⟨hN', hNN'⟩))
    have haB : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have := le_inf ha_rest haN
      rw [sup_inf_assoc1, (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
      · exact this
      · exact sSup_le (fun y hy => (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hy.1)
    exact (hB' N hN hx).le_bot ha haB

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN_Union⟩
    simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hN_Union
    rcases hN_Union with ⟨hN, h_x_in_B⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ le_sSup h_x_in_B
    have hUN : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)
    have haV : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      apply ha'.trans; apply sSup_le; intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨hy_Union, hy_ne_x⟩
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy_Union
      rcases hy_Union with ⟨N', hy_Union'⟩
      simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hy_Union'
      rcases hy_Union' with ⟨hN', hy_in_B⟩
      by_cases h_eq : N' = N
      · subst h_eq; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy_in_B, hy_ne_x⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_trans (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hy_in_B) (le_sSup ⟨hN', h_eq⟩))
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) ⊓ N := le_inf haV (ha.trans hxN)
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le hUN, (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN h_x_in_B) ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx_B⟩
    have ha_le_N : a ≤ N := ha.trans ((hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx_B)
    have ha_le_sup : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le_iff.mpr (fun y hy => ?_))
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hy_B⟩, hy_ne_x⟩
      obtain rfl | h_ne := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy_B, hy_ne_x⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right ((hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hy_B).trans (le_sSup ⟨hN', h_ne⟩))
    have ha_le_inf : a ≤ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) ⊓ N := le_inf ha_le_sup ha_le_N
    rw [ModularLattice.modular ((hB N hN).symm ▸ sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)),
      (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at ha_le_inf
    exact (hB' N hN hx_B).le_bot ha ha_le_inf

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hxN⟩
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hxN)
    have h_rest : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine sSup_le_iff.mpr (fun y hy => ?_)
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨M, hM, hyM⟩, hyx⟩
      by_cases h : M = N
      · subst h; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyM, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_trans (hB M hM ▸ le_sSup hyM) (le_sSup (⟨hM, h⟩ : M ∈ D.carrier \ {N})))
    have ha_inf : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_inf_N := le_inf (ha'.trans h_rest) haN
      have h_y_le_N : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ sSup_le (fun y hy => le_sSup hy.1)
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le h_y_le_N, (D.sSupIndep N hN).eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at h_inf_N
    exact (hB' N hN x hxN).le_bot ha ha_inf

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hxN⟩
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans ((hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hxN)
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le_iff.mpr ?_)
      rintro y ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
      obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right ((hB N' hN') ▸ le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', hne⟩ le_rfl)
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have := le_inf this haN
      rwa [ModularLattice.sup_inf_assoc (sSup_le fun y hy => (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hy.1),
        (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact hB' N hN hxN ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_x_le_N : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
    have h_S_rest : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (SetLike.coe D \ {N}) := by
      apply sSup_le; rintro y ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
      by_cases h : N' = N
      · exact h ▸ le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le (⟨hN', h⟩ : N' ∈ SetLike.coe D \ {N}) (by rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hyB))
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have : a ≤ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (SetLike.coe D \ {N})) ⊓ N := le_inf (ha'.trans h_S_rest) (ha.trans h_x_le_N)
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le (by rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le (fun y hy => le_sSup hy.1)),
        (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN hx).le_bot ha this

obtain ⟨N, hN, hxN⟩ : ∃ N ∈ D, x ∈ B N hN := by simpa [Set.mem_iUnion] using hx
    have hx_le_N : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hxN
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_le_sup : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N}) := by
        apply ha'.trans (sSup_le _)
        rintro y ⟨hyS, hyx⟩
        obtain ⟨N', hN', hyBN'⟩ := by simpa [Set.mem_iUnion] using hyS
        obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
        · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyBN', hyx⟩)
        · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', hne⟩ ((hB N' hN').symm ▸ le_sSup hyBN'))
      have := le_inf h_le_sup (ha.trans hx_le_N)
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (λ _ h => (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup h.1)),
        (D.sSupIndep hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN x hxN).le_bot ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx; rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_le : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ hN, B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
        refine sSup_le fun y hy => ?_
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
        obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
        · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
        · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le (⟨hN', hne⟩ : N' ∈ D.carrier \ {N}) (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hyB))
      have h_le_N : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ sSup_le (fun y hy => le_sSup hy.1)
      have : a ≤ (sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N})) ⊓ N :=
        le_inf (ha'.trans h_le) (ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx))
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le h_le_N, (D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (Set.diff_subset _ _) Set.not_mem_diff_self).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx_B⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx_B
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have ha_sup : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N}) := by
        refine ha'.trans (sSup_le_iff.mpr fun y hy => ?_)
        simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
        rcases hy with ⟨⟨N', hN', hyB⟩, hyx⟩
        rcases eq_or_ne N N' with rfl | h
        · exact le_sup_left.trans' (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
        · exact le_sup_right.trans' ((hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hyB).trans (le_sSup ⟨hN', h.symm⟩))
      have := le_inf ha_sup (ha.trans hxN)
      rwa [sup_inf_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (fun y hy => (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hy.1)),
        (D.sSupIndep hN).eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact hB' N hN hx_B ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N₀, hN₀, hx_S₀⟩
    have ha_N₀ : a ≤ N₀ := ha.trans (hB N₀ hN₀ ▸ le_sSup hx_S₀)
    apply hB' N₀ hN₀ x hx_S₀ a ha
    have h_le_sup : a ≤ sSup (B N₀ hN₀ \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N₀}) := by
      apply ha'.trans
      apply sSup_le
      intro y hy
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨⟨N, hN, hy_B⟩, hy_neq_x⟩
      by_cases h_eq : N = N₀
      · subst h_eq; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy_B, hy_neq_x⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right ((hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hy_B).trans (le_sSup ⟨hN, h_eq⟩))
    rw [← sup_bot, ← (D.sSupIndep hN₀).symm.eq_bot,
        ← sup_inf_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (fun y hy => hB N₀ hN₀ ▸ le_sSup hy.1))]
    exact le_inf h_le_sup ha_N₀

rcases hx with ⟨N, hN_ext⟩
    rcases hN_ext with ⟨hN, hx_B⟩
    have ha_le_N : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx_B)
    have ha_le_sup_diff : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le ?_)
      intro y hy
      rcases hy with ⟨hy_mem, hy_neq_x⟩
      rcases hy_mem with ⟨N', hN_ext'⟩
      rcases hN_ext' with ⟨hN', hy_B⟩
      by_cases h_eq : N' = N
      · subst h_eq; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy_B, hy_neq_x⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le (⟨hN', h_eq⟩) (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hy_B))
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h := le_inf ha_le_sup_diff ha_le_N
      rw [sup_inf_assoc_of_le (sSup_le (fun y hy => (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hy.1))] at h
      exact h.trans (sup_le le_rfl (D.sSupIndep N hN (sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊓ N) inf_le_right inf_le_left))
    exact hB' N hN x hx_B a ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
    have hYN : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le fun _ h => le_sSup h.1
    have hYZ : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le fun b hb => ?_)
      rcases hb.1 with ⟨N', hN', hb'⟩
      obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_left.trans' (le_sSup ⟨hb', hb.2⟩)
      · refine le_sup_right.trans' (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', hne⟩ ?_)
        rw [hB N' hN']; exact le_sSup hb'
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      exact (le_inf hYZ (ha.trans hxN)).trans (sup_inf_assoc_of_le hYN _).le
        |>.trans (by rw [D.sSupIndep N hN |>.eq_bot, sup_bot_eq]; exact le_rfl)
    exact hB' N hN x hx a ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have h_a_N : a ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact ha.trans (le_sSup hx)
    have h_a_S : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le fun y hy ↦ ?_)
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff] at hy
      rcases hy with ⟨hy_mem, hyne⟩
      rcases hy_mem with ⟨M, hM, hyB⟩
      if hMN : M = N then
        subst hMN; exact (le_sSup (show y ∈ B N hN \ {x} from ⟨hyB, hyne⟩)).trans le_sup_left
      else
        rw [hB M hM] at hyB; exact (le_trans (le_sSup hyB) (le_sSup (show M ∈ D.carrier \ {N} from ⟨hM, hMN⟩))).trans le_sup_right
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      rw [sup_comm] at h_a_S
      have h_mod : N ⊓ (sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x})) = sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
        rw [inf_sup_assoc_of_le (by rw [hB N hN]; exact sSup_le_sSup (Set.diff_subset _ _)), (D.sSupIndep hN).eq_bot, sup_bot_eq]
      exact (le_inf h_a_N h_a_S).trans h_mod.le
    exact (hB' N hN hx).le_bot (le_inf ha this)

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have ha_N : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx)
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := ha'.trans (sSup_le fun y ⟨⟨N', hN', hy'⟩, hyx⟩ ↦ by
      obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy', hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', hne⟩ (le_sSup hy')))
    have := le_inf this ha_N
    rw [sup_inf_assoc_of_le (sSup_le fun y hy ↦ hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hy.1),
      (D.sSupIndep N hN).eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at this
    exact hB' N hN x hx a ha this

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    rcases hx with ⟨N, hN, hx⟩
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx
    have h_rest : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      refine sSup_le ?_
      rintro y ⟨⟨N', hN', hy'⟩, hxy⟩
      obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_of_right (le_sSup ⟨hy', hxy⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_left ((hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hy').trans (le_sSup ⟨hN', hne⟩))
    have ha_BN : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_le : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ sSup_le (fun y hy => le_sSup hy.1)
      have : a ≤ (sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) ⊔ sSup (B N hN \ {x})) ⊓ N := le_inf (ha'.trans h_rest) (ha.trans hxN)
      rwa [inf_sup_assoc_of_le h_le, (D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN).symm.eq_bot, bot_sup_eq] at this
    exact (hB' N hN).disjoint_sSup hx |> disjoint_iff_inf_le.mp |> (le_inf ha ha_BN).trans

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := by simpa using hx
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans (hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hx)
    have hSN : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := hB N hN ▸ sSup_le (fun y hy => le_sSup hy.1)
    have : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le ?_)
      rintro y ⟨hy, hyx⟩
      obtain ⟨N', hN', hy'⟩ := by simpa using hy
      obtain rfl | hne := eq_or_ne N' N
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy', hyx⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup_of_le (Set.mem_diff_singleton.mpr ⟨hN', hne.symm⟩) (le_sSup hy'))
    have ha_le_S : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_mod := (modular_le_inf hSN (b := sSup (D.carrier \ {N}))).symm
      have h_disj : N ⊓ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) = ⊥ := (D.sSupIndep.disjoint_sSup hN (Set.diff_subset _ _) (fun h => h.2 rfl)).eq_bot
      rw [h_disj, sup_bot_eq] at h_mod
      exact (le_inf this haN).trans (le_of_eq h_mod)
    exact hB' N hN x hx a ha ha_le_S

obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ : ∃ N (hN : N ∈ D), x ∈ B N hN := by
      simpa only [Set.mem_iUnion, exists_prop] using hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ le_sSup hx
    have haN : a ≤ N := ha.trans hxN
    have ha_le_sup : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D \ {N}) := by
      refine ha'.trans (sSup_le_iff.mpr fun y hy ↦ ?_)
      obtain ⟨⟨_, ⟨N', rfl⟩, ⟨hN', rfl⟩, hyB⟩, hyx⟩ := hy
      if h : N' = N then
        subst h; exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hyB, hyx⟩)
      else
        exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le ⟨hN', h⟩ ((hB N' hN').symm ▸ le_sSup hyB))
    have h_le_N : sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ≤ N := (hB N hN).symm ▸ sSup_le (fun y hy ↦ le_sSup hy.1)
    have ha_le_S1 : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_mod := IsModularLattice.inf_sup_assoc (sSup (B N hN \ {x})) (sSup (D \ {N})) N h_le_N
      rw [(D.sSupIndep N hN).symm.eq_bot, sup_bot] at h_mod
      exact (le_inf ha_le_sup haN).trans h_mod.le
    exact (hB' N hN x hx).le_bot ha ha_le_S1

simp only [Set.mem_iUnion] at hx
    obtain ⟨N, hN, hx⟩ := hx
    have hxN : x ≤ N := by rw [hB N hN]; exact le_sSup hx
    have h_sSup : sSup ((⋃ N, ⋃ (hN : N ∈ D), B N hN) \ {x}) ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) ⊔ sSup (D.carrier \ {N}) := by
      refine sSup_le ?_
      simp only [Set.mem_diff, Set.mem_iUnion, Set.mem_singleton_iff, and_imp]
      intro y N' hN' hy hne
      rcases eq_or_ne N N' with rfl | hne'
      · exact le_sup_of_le_left (le_sSup ⟨hy, hne⟩)
      · exact le_sup_of_le_right (le_sSup_of_le (show N' ∈ D.carrier \ {N} from ⟨hN', hne'⟩) (hB N' hN' ▸ le_sSup hy))
    have h_a_le : a ≤ sSup (B N hN \ {x}) := by
      have h_mod := sup_inf_assoc_of_le (hB N hN ▸ sSup_le (fun y hy => hB N hN ▸ le_sSup hy.1)) (sSup (D.carrier \ {N}))
      rw [inf_comm, (D.sSupIndep' hN).eq_bot, sup_bot_eq] at h_mod
      exact (le_inf (ha'.trans h_sSup) (ha.trans hxN)).trans h_mod.le
    exact (hB' N hN hx).le_bot ha h_a_le
